arms_mandatory_baselines: alone-R1 per store arm (each arm's own surfaces - the within-arm baseline that makes lifts comparable across arms)
alone-R3 per store arm (bridge restatement of the f2b-form effect; absolute, no ratio, no gate)
shuffled-verify-retry on the kernel store (seed-pinned derangement - the bridge to f2b-replicate, verbatim mechanism; claim-polarity asymmetry disclosed in the design doc section 5 attack 6)

plain-padded length-matched secondary arm (ASM-1082: deterministic cyclic whole-own-segment padding of the accepted concise plain store back into the kernel-gloss word band, fail-closed KNULL_ERR_PAD_*, no authoring gate per ASM-1087; alone-R1 + verify-retry-R1 cells only per ASM-1086; the verdict-bearing length control behind the ASM-1083 superiority guard - rationale docs/next/design/knull-optionb-analysis.md section 3(b); disclosed conservative bias direction: any answer-key-repetition effect favors the padded arm, AGAINST the content claim)

NOTE kernel-as-text + gloss-self-verify text nulls are NOT re-run: the Law-2 nulls were measured against this exact mechanism in f2b-replicate (beats_text_null, beats_gloss_self_verify both passed, audit CONFIRMED) and no claim here exceeds that scope; this record varies STORE CONTENT within the already-nulled mechanism

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness on the arm's own rank-prefix item set (n=1000 skeletons, paired across arms by skeleton_uid: identical concept, template type, distractor/donor coordinates and option-slot layout; only store-injected bytes differ - map D-2)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct

dependent_vars.definition: acc(verify-retry-R1, k=4) - acc(alone-R1), item-paired WITHIN arm, seed-averaged; ABSOLUTE - no denominator appears in any verdict-bearing quantity (the F2 degenerate-denominator lesson); the only ratio anywhere is the bridge SECONDARY's recovery fraction, gated behind the bridge instrument gate that bounds its denominator away from zero
dependent_vars.name: lift_abs

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, latency, usd/query, store bytes per arm (F0 ledger; verifier CPU metered at the pinned rate) - DESCRIPTIVE, feeds the flops-parity instrument gate and the V ledger; no efficiency claim is tested in this record
dependent_vars.name: v_components

levels: plain-padded(alone-R1 + verify-retry-R1 cells only, seeds {0,1,2}, same 1000 rank-prefix paired skeletons - role-limited length control excluded from the alone-R3 bridge and the shuffled control, ASM-1086)
independent_vars.name: store

assumptions.claim: f2b lift +0.1507 absolute (one-sided 95% BCa LB +0.1053) vs 1.7B-alone on fresh covered items, audit CONFIRMED; derangement recovery ~0; adopted licence = correct-alignment-specific (registry/verdicts/f2b-replicate.json + assessments + feasibility-synthesis 2b)

map M-V: 3456/3456 verifier decisions bitwise identical after stripping all non-gloss record fields (poc/knull mock map-check.json, re-proven on the authored-store build 2026-07-10) - kernel vectors/ASTs inject zero bytes into the accept seam; the requested vector-free arm is map-resolved and not run

G-3 token parity is SCOPED per ASM-1085: the +/-10 percent pre-freeze band (run-time gate +/-20 percent) BINDS the token-matched arms only - plain-padded and opaque - while the concise plain arm is exempt by design, its ratio metered and disclosed DESCRIPTIVE (/gates/flops_ratio_plain); MEASURED components on the built v4 item files at the pinned SmolLM2-135M tokenizer: mean prompt tokens kernel 110.5, plain-padded 109.4 (ratio 0.990, in band), opaque 111.0 (ratio 1.004, in band), plain 73.2 (ratio 0.662, disclosed, outside the band as the Option-B ruling intends); artifact poc/knull/inputs-v4/g3-token-band.json + per-item sidecar poc/knull/inputs-v4/prompt-tokens.json; binding resolution = the run-time HFLM-metered F0 FLOPs ledger (the ASM-1088 pattern - pre-freeze token evidence is never a premise)
power planning bound 0.65-0.95 at margin 0.05, n=1000 - planning constant, never a measurement; resolution: realized CI width at analysis (ASM to be registered at freeze)

the authored plain store (dictionary-register English at natural concise lexicographic length per the Option-B ruling ASM-1080, zero NSM-legal syntax, linter-gated under the relaxed Option-B G-1 contract, LLM-drafted by the designer role - a different vendor/family from the SmolLM2 hosts, disclosed in poc/knull/inputs-v4/plain-authored.json (v4.0.0; acceptance lineage: ASM-0703 two-family blind gate MEASURED gate_met false - GPT-5.6 4/10, Haiku 3/10 - RESOLVED by the maintainer issue-17 acceptance ruling, the v4 store accepted with residual naturalness-gate defects documented, plus the maintainer blind style sign-off 10/10 poc/knull/inputs-v3/plain-spotcheck-current-RESULT.md; ASM-0704/ASM-0705/ASM-0706 lineage)) does not shift verify acceptance dynamics beyond what the within-arm baseline + difficulty gate absorb; resolution: truthstyle-2x2 style axis + the per-type descriptive table

Option-B design block ASM-1080..1088 REGISTERED (claims-check PASS; tags exactly as registered - all STIPULATED): ASM-1080 Option-B ruling + relaxed G-1 contract; ASM-1081 the verdict-bearing length control is the experimental plain-padded arm, covariate reads DESCRIPTIVE only; ASM-1082 deterministic plain-padded generator (fail-closed; feasibility MEASURED 108/108 on the v4 store: 102 padded + 6 degenerate no-pad; disclosed conservative bias direction); ASM-1083 IUT superiority guard with length_guard_available forcing; ASM-1084 NULL/FAIL a-fortiori readings, the 'at no greater token budget' clause and the natural-length envelope sentence; ASM-1085 gate scope (parity binds plain-padded + opaque; plain metered DESCRIPTIVE; difficulty/extraction gates extend to plain-padded); ASM-1086 plain-padded cell budget (alone-R1 + verify-retry-R1, seeds {0,1,2}); ASM-1087 quality-gate scope (padded arm is a deterministic transform of the quality-gated concise store, no authoring gate); ASM-1088 pre-freeze token evidence is never a premise - binding resolution = the v4-build G-3 artifact + the run-time F0 FLOPs ledger

endpoints.test: PRIMARY (exactly one): TOST equivalence at margin +/-0.05 ABSOLUTE on D = mean_i [ lift_i(kernel) - lift_i(best) ], lift_i(a) = seedmean(verify_i) - seedmean(alone_i) within arm a, i indexes paired skeletons; best = the aligned non-NSM arm among {plain, plain-padded, opaque} passing its difficulty gate with the larger point lift (pre-declared selection); paired skeleton-level BCa bootstrap B=10000, seed 20260710, ONE shared resampling plan across all statistics; equivalent iff one-sided 95% BCa LB > -0.05 AND one-sided 95% BCa UB < +0.05. Superiority read (ASM-1083 intersection-union conjunction, the length guard): /analysis/kernel_superior_beyond_margin = [one-sided 95% BCa LB of D > +0.05] AND [one-sided 95% BCa LB of D_matched > +0.05], D_matched = mean_i [ lift_i(kernel) - lift_i(best_matched) ], best_matched = the eligible token-matched arm (plain-padded if it passes its difficulty gate, else opaque) with the larger point lift (/analysis/best_matched_arm, /analysis/diff_matched*); a kernel win must survive comparison at token parity, so it cannot be purchased by budget alone; an IUT conjunction at a fixed margin only shrinks type-I error, so the Holm family is NOT resized; if no token-matched arm is eligible, /gates/length_guard_available = false FORCES the field false (the outcome space then contains NULL/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE only). Inferiority read: UB < -0.05 (/analysis/kernel_inferior_beyond_margin) on D, unchanged - kernel losing to an aligned arm at less-or-equal budget is the anti-content outcome a fortiori (ASM-1084). ABSOLUTE lifts only - no ratio is verdict-bearing anywhere in the primary

INSTRUMENT gate (H-KN3 part 1): kernel-arm lift one-sided 95% BCa LB > +0.05 - the ablation cannot attribute a lift that failed to reproduce; on failure the verdict is INSTRUMENT-INVALID (nothing to attribute), never a hypothesis event; a bridge failure raises a surface-sensitivity flag on the F2 line and does NOT contradict the f2b-replicate PASS (different surfaces)

INSTRUMENT gate per aligned arm: |acc(alone-R1, arm) - acc(alone-R1, kernel)| <= 0.15 (3-seed mean; /gates/difficulty_band_plain, /gates/difficulty_band_plain_padded, /gates/difficulty_band_opaque - extended to plain-padded per ASM-1085); a failing arm leaves the comparator set BEFORE selection; /gates/any_aligned_arm_eligible ranges over the three aligned arms; ALL THREE failing => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (fork F-KN-B is decided BY this gate at analysis time, not by a person)

INSTRUMENT gate per arm: extraction-success Wilson-LB >= 0.90 over all verify calls (P10 discipline, measured in-run; per-arm fields /gates/extraction_wilson_lb_* incl. plain_padded per ASM-1085; n_planned 3000 verify calls per verify arm)

INSTRUMENT gate re-scoped per ASM-1085: per-query mean FLOPs of each TOKEN-MATCHED verify arm within +/-20% of the kernel verify arm (F0 ledger; fields /gates/flops_ratio_plain_padded, /gates/flops_ratio_opaque) - the matched-budget guarantee for the arms that carry it, enforced at build by the token-calibrated word band and pre-verified at the pinned tokenizer (v4 G-3 artifact, ratios 0.990/1.004); the concise plain arm is EXEMPT BY DESIGN (the Option-B ruling's point), its ratio metered and reported as /gates/flops_ratio_plain, DESCRIPTIVE, never a PASS/FAIL input (measured 0.662 at build); NOTE the gate reads FALSE on MOCK records only (StubLM chars/4 proxy undercounts nonce text - disclosed stipulated mock artifact)

Holm family F-sec(knull) (H-KN3 part 2): shuffled-derangement recovery on the kernel store < 0.30 (one-sided 95% BCa UB), the f2b-replicate secondary verbatim, on the regenerated surfaces; the recovery ratio's denominator is bounded away from zero by the bridge gate; interpreted with the disclosed claim-polarity asymmetry (design doc section 5 attack 6; fork F-KN-D's kill applies if failure is claim-type-only)
Holm family F-sec(knull): kernel-arm acc(verify-retry R1) - acc(alone R3) one-sided 95% BCa LB > 0 - the f2b-replicate primary's form restated on regenerated surfaces (absolute, no denominator)

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, never verdict-bearing, OUTSIDE the Holm family (ASM-1081; registered as secondary because kot-reg/1 has no descriptive role): lift(plain-padded) - lift(plain), skeleton-paired BCa two-sided 95% CI (/analysis/length_effect_lb95, /analysis/length_effect_ub95) - the pure token-budget effect at fixed content (optionb-analysis section 4.5)

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, never verdict-bearing, OUTSIDE the Holm family (ASM-1081, the demoted covariate read; optionb-analysis section 3a/4.5): Spearman correlation across skeletons of [lift_i(kernel) - lift_i(plain)] with the per-item prompt-token deficit Delta-t_i from the pinned prompt-tokens sidecar; reported for triangulation only

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, never verdict-bearing, OUTSIDE the Holm family (registered as secondary because kot-reg/1 has no descriptive role): per item-type accuracies and lifts per arm; headroom-normalized lifts are reported here and NOWHERE else

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: claims are scoped to <=1.7B hosts (verify host 135M; 1.7B only as the bridge baseline), the kernel-covered SELF-AUTHORED templated definitional-QA family over the same 108 covered concepts, k=4, this normalization/accept machinery (norm_text string identity + segment membership), and the oracle-favourable construction HELD FIXED BY DESIGN in every arm - verbatim: on the D-QA slice the verifier's accept test is string-equality to the same canonical record that DEFINED the gold answer, so its measured lift is inflated by the eval's construction; K-NULL varies only WHAT the store says, never that construction, so NO outcome here speaks to gold-label independence (f2b-transfer's question), to externally-authored items, to non-templated phrasings, to hosts >1.7B, or to any other corpus. Natural-length scope (ASM-1084): the plain arm is authored at natural concise dictionary length under the Option-B ruling, so token-budget parity is NOT a property of the kernel-vs-plain contrast; parity is enforced through the token-matched arms (plain-padded, opaque; ASM-1085) and the superiority read is length-guarded through them (ASM-1083) - no claim here speaks to what NSM content buys at UNmatched token budgets beyond the descriptive length reads. Equivalence (NULL) licenses the relabel of the f2b lift as a generic aligned-deterministic-answer-key + retry effect at no greater token budget AT THIS SCOPE and nothing wider; superiority (PASS) licenses NSM-content contribution >= 0.05 absolute AT THIS SCOPE and says nothing about semantics-in-general or transfer. Coverage disclosure (mandatory, verbatim): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0 - MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice. Two host rungs license a SIGN, not a slope.
hypotheses: H-KN1 equivalence (the deflationary reading): |lift(kernel) - lift(best aligned non-NSM store)| < 0.05 (TOST, one-sided 95% BCa bounds both inside the margin) => the verify-retry lift is store-content-generic - recorded as verdict NULL with the same prominence as a PASS (design doc maps this to PASS-GENERIC)

H-KN2 superiority (the content reading, ASM-1083 token-matched guard): lift(kernel) - lift(best) > 0.05 one-sided (BCa LB > +0.05) AND lift(kernel) - lift(best_matched) > 0.05 one-sided (BCa LB > +0.05; best_matched = the eligible token-matched arm - plain-padded if it passes its difficulty gate, else opaque - with the larger point lift) => NSM content carries weight beyond alignment AND beyond token budget at this scope - verdict PASS (design doc: PASS-CONTENT); no eligible token-matched arm => superiority unavailable (length_guard_available false); the inverse (kernel INFERIOR beyond margin, BCa UB < -0.05) is a registered outcome - verdict FAIL (deflationary a fortiori: NSM surface is a net cost at matched alignment and at no greater token budget)

H-KN3 bridge: the kernel arm reproduces the f2b mechanism signature on regenerated surfaces - verify-retry lift over R1-alone one-sided 95% BCa LB > +0.05 (instrument gate, failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never a hypothesis event) and shuffled-derangement recovery < 0.30 (Holm secondary, the f2b bound verbatim)
kill_criterion_verbatim: K-NULL verbatim kills (verdict-enum mapping: NULL carries PASS-GENERIC, PASS carries PASS-CONTENT, FAIL carries KERNEL-INFERIOR; equal prominence for all outcomes): (a) bridge gate fails (kernel-arm lift LB <= +0.05 on regenerated surfaces) => INSTRUMENT-INVALID - the f2b mechanism did not reproduce, nothing to attribute, and the f2b-replicate PASS is NOT thereby contradicted (different surfaces) but a surface-sensitivity flag is raised on the F2 line; (b) TOST passes (verdict NULL) => the kernel-content attribution DIES at this scope - the f2b lift is licensed as a generic aligned-deterministic-answer-key + retry effect at no greater - possibly smaller - token budget than the kernel store (ASM-1084), all forward narration adopts that phrase, and F2-line investment re-routes to authoring-cost economics (the narrowed efficiency reading) and to f2b-transfer; (c) kernel-INFERIOR beyond margin (UB < -0.05, verdict FAIL) => same deflationary consequence as (b) PLUS NSM surface is a measured net cost at matched alignment and at no greater token budget (ASM-1084) - the strongest anti-content outcome; (d) ALL aligned arms (plain, plain-padded, opaque) fail the difficulty band => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, redesign the stores (forks F-KN-B/F-KN-C), mint a new id; nulls and positives get equal prominence.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py
